justification: All 7 ACs implemented and tested. Collect-all-errors pattern confirmed by AC7 multi-error tests. AC5 (conditional required for express) and AC6 (conditional forbidden for standard) are distinct and correctly implemented with explicit test inputs. Error shape is { field, code } throughout. AC7 tested with multi-failure requests (missing name + negative weight, and a three-error case). acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 7 ACs.

observations.text: AC5/AC6 correctly distinguished: saturday_delivery=false treated as 'provided' (no AC5 error, triggers AC6 error for standard)
AC7 tested with both 2-error and 3-error scenarios, verifying errors.length
Boundary tests at weight=0 (invalid) and weight=1000 (valid) / 1001 (invalid)
15 tests covering all ACs including edge cases like whitespace-only recipient_name
